episodes.title: "There Are SERIOUS Questions About Whether Epstein Was KILLED" | Shredded Docs Revealed
episodes.description:
Rep. Ro Khanna raises serious questions about whether Jeffrey Epstein was killed in prison. Investigative reporter Tara Palmeri has the latest on the hidden files. 

Khanna, co-author of the bipartisan Epstein Files Transparency Act, tells Jim Acosta what stopped the conversation cold — new reporting on bags of shredded documents found at the New York jail after Epstein's death, a quietly rescheduled Oversight Committee hearing with the prison guard who missed check-ins that night, and whether Epstein had ties to intelligence agencies.

BE SURE TO CATCH THE FULL INTERVIEW HERE: 
https://www.youtube.com/live/FnO7rvqIvt0?si=wnfAyBBZNUBErSSn



🔔 Subscribe and hit the bell for more.
👍 Like and share if you want the full truth.
#EpsteinFiles, #RoKhanna, #IranWar, #JimAcostaShow, #BreakingNews



About Jim Acosta:
Jim Acosta is a journalist who spent decades holding power accountable as Chief White House Correspondent, covering five presidential administrations and asking the tough questions others wouldn't. From the White House briefing room to the world's most dangerous places, Jim has never backed down from the truth.
Now, Jim brings that same relentless pursuit of facts directly to you through independent media. In these critical times for our democracy, we can't rely on corporate media to tell the whole story. We need journalists who will speak truth to power without fear or favor.
This is where real journalism happens.
Jim delivers the unvarnished truth about what's happening in Washington and beyond – no corporate censorship, no billionaire owners calling the shots. Just straight talk from someone who's been in the room where it happens.
Democracy depends on an informed citizenry. Join our community of truth-seekers fighting for facts over fiction.

👆 SUBSCRIBE NOW and hit that notification bell to join the hundreds of thousands of people on Youtube and Substack who refuse to be misled. 
Share this content. Support independent journalism.
Together, we're stronger. Together, we defend democracy.

#TruthMatters #DemocracyDefenders #IndependentMedia

episodes.title: Epstein Survivor Dani Bensky: “The Cover-Up Is Deep” — Inside the Fight To Expose the Epstein Files
episodes.description:
Epstein survivor Dani Bensky joins the show to discuss what survivors believe is an ongoing cover-up surrounding the Epstein files — and why many victims feel the truth is still being withheld from the public.
Bensky explains how survivors have been working with lawmakers to push for transparency and accountability, arguing that systemic failures allowed abuse to continue for years despite warnings and complaints. She describes meeting with members of Congress and pushing for legislation aimed at reforming statutes of limitations and ensuring investigations move forward.
The conversation also explores claims that key documents may still be hidden or redacted, how survivors are navigating political divisions in Washington, and why many believe the investigation into Epstein’s network is far from finished.
This is independent journalism. Subscribe to support our work.
